checks.description: Readiness checks run before opening a PR. All on by default (current behavior).

knowledge_check_enabled.description: Prompt to curate knowledge from the diff before opening a PR.

readme_check_enabled.description: Verify READMEs are updated for added/renamed/removed features.

version_bump_check_enabled.description: Verify plugin versions are bumped and in sync.

review_bot.description: Mention that triggers the automated PR review.
